title: Cooksmart Signature 24cm Casserole Pot with Lid – Cast Aluminium | Non-Stick | PFOA & PFAS Free | Free Felt Pan Protector | Induction, Gas, & Electric Hob Compatible (Sage Green)
features: Spacious 24cm casserole pot with lid – Ideal for hearty family meals, slow-cooked casseroles, soups, curries, and stews.
Premium cast aluminium body – Ensures even heat distribution, energy-efficient cooking, and long-lasting durability compared to standard aluminium pans.
non-stick coating – 100% PFOA & PFAS free, supports healthier cooking with minimal oil, prevents food sticking, and makes cleaning effortless.
Safe and comfortable handling – Equipped with ergonomic soft-touch, cool-touch handles. Comes with a free felt pan protector to help prevent scratches in storage.
Elegant Sage Green finish – Dishwasher safe and suitable for induction, gas, and electric hobs. A versatile and stylish essential for modern kitchens.
description: Cooksmart Signature Casserole Pot with Lid 24cm – Sage Green | Cast Aluminium Non-Stick | Induction, Gas, & Electric Hob Compatible | Dishwasher Safe | Ergonomic Handles
